div.h1: TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION: CACHE LINE CONTENTION & ALIGNMENT
div.h2: MESI Protocol Impact on False Sharing (64-Byte Granularity)

ol.li: Measure: Identify high-frequency atomic writes across threads.
Audit: Check offsets using pahole or offsetof().
Align: Apply alignas(64) to prevent "Cache Line Ping-Pong".
Verify: Use perf stat -e l1d_pend_miss.pending or cpc_event on modern CPUs.

div.p: head (Core 0) and tail (Core 1) occupy the same L1/L2 cache line. Updating tail forces hardware to invalidate the entire line for Core 0.
Result: L1 Cache Miss (Remote). Penalty: ~200-400 CPU cycles.
Variables are strictly isolated to distinct lines. Core 0 owns Line 0 [Modified]. Core 1 owns Line 1 [Modified]. Zero interconnect traffic.
Latency: ~1ns (L1 Hit) Throughput: Maximum Line Speed.
